measures.name: Revenue
measures.description: Net revenue after surcharge and discount at current filter context.

measures.name: Direct Cost
measures.description: Carrier, handling, fuel and customs direct costs.

measures.name: Gross Profit
measures.description: Revenue less direct cost.

measures.name: Gross Margin %
measures.description: Gross profit divided by revenue.

measures.name: Payroll Cost
measures.description: Salary cost from the headcount plan.

measures.name: Non Payroll OPEX
measures.description: Rent, software, marketing, travel and G&A cost excluding payroll.

measures.name: EBITDA
measures.description: Forecast P&L operating profit proxy before tax and capex.

measures.name: EBITDA Margin %
measures.description: EBITDA divided by revenue.

measures.name: Jobs
measures.description: Total shipment or service jobs.

measures.name: Revenue per Job
measures.description: Revenue productivity per job.

measures.name: Variable Cost per Job
measures.description: Direct cost productivity per job.

measures.name: Average FTE
measures.description: Average monthly FTE in the selected period.

measures.name: Jobs per FTE
measures.description: Capacity productivity based on average monthly FTE.

measures.name: Operating Cash Flow
measures.description: EBITDA less tax and working-capital drag.

measures.name: Ending Cash Latest Month
measures.description: Ending cash balance at latest visible period.

measures.name: Working Capital
measures.description: AR and AP timing impact based on DSO and DPO assumptions.

measures.name: DSO Days
measures.description: Average days sales outstanding in current scenario.

measures.name: DPO Days
measures.description: Average days payable outstanding in current scenario.

measures.name: MAPE
measures.description: Mean absolute percentage error for forecast accuracy tracking.

measures.name: Forecast Bias %
measures.description: Average signed forecast bias.

measures.name: Base Revenue
measures.description: Base scenario revenue for variance comparisons.

measures.name: Scenario Revenue Variance vs Base
measures.description: Selected scenario revenue less base scenario revenue.

measures.name: Scenario Revenue Variance % vs Base
measures.description: Selected scenario revenue variance percentage versus base.
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Scenario Revenue Variance vs Base], [Base Revenue])

annotations.name: Project
annotations.value: Project 02 - Driver-Based Forecasting Driver-Based Forecasting & Scenario Planning Model
